name_en: 💕【New】The circular interlocking double-G motif draws inspiration from the brand's heritage, adding elegance to blue matte leather accessories as always. This blue matte leather card case brings the charm of the 1970s style to life. It is meticulously designed with multiple compartments for various uses.
name_cn:
💕【New】The circular interlocking double-G motif draws inspiration from the brand's heritage, adding elegance to blue matte leather accessories as always. This blue matte leather card case brings the charm of the 1970s style to life. It is meticulously designed with multiple compartments for various uses.
Blue matte leather
Taffeta lining
Enamel circular interlocking details
Interior: card slots, 1 coin pocket
Snap closure
Model: 818795
Open dimensions: 22cm (W) x 9cm (H); Closed dimensions: 11cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Weight: approx. 80g
Color: Blue matte leather/Original leather
Italian creation
